repositoryDescription: This repository contains end-to-end tests for Cross River Bank's lending/selling platform. It simulates the entire selling environment to validate loan management, interest calculations, purchasing workflows, and financial transfers.
keyFeatures: Loan lifecycle testing from ingestion through purchase
Interest calculation and volume fee validation
Grooming process testing (changing loan types, investors)
Fee collection and fee sweep tests

apis.web-api: The main Selling web API service that exposes endpoints for loan management, purchases, and administrative operations
apis.cos-simulator: Mock Capital Operating System (COS) simulator for handling payments and financial transfers
apis.hooks-service: RabbitMQ-based event hooks service for system notifications like batch completion and status changes

dataEntities.name: Loan
dataEntities.description: Represents a loan with attributes like loan_id, mpl_id, issuing_bank_id, loan_type, status, amount, interest_rate

dataEntities.name: Contract
dataEntities.description: Defines terms between MPL and bank including fee structure, accrual method, and interest calculation

dataEntities.name: Batch
dataEntities.description: Groups loans being purchased together with status tracking

dataEntities.name: Transfer
dataEntities.description: Financial transaction between accounts with types for interest, principal, volume fees, etc.

dataEntities.name: LoanAccount
dataEntities.description: Represents accounting accounts associated with loans (interest, principal, fees, etc.)

integrations.mssql: Source database simulating Arix DB and ArixContractsDB with loan data
integrations.postgres: Warehouse database for the selling platform

aws-services.s3: For servicing data ingestion via CSV files

architecturePatterns: Event-driven architecture using RabbitMQ for hooks/notifications
Simulated time travel for testing temporal workflows
Mock services to simulate external dependencies
Modular test components with assertions organized by business domain
businessDomain: Loan selling and purchasing platform for financial institutions. The system handles the lifecycle of loans from origination through purchase, including interest calculations, fee management, and transaction processing.

keyFiles.description: Defines the complete testing environment with all required services including databases, web API, and simulators
Simulates the COS (Capital Operating System) with account management and payment processing endpoints
Main orchestrator that executes the test scenarios by coordinating all test components
Database utilities for loan data manipulation, queries, and validation
Interest calculation engine implementing various algorithms (Standard, SOFR, Combined)
Contract model defining terms between MPL and bank that govern interest and fees
Simulates Airflow DAG execution for loan ingestion, curation, and interest accrual
Validation utilities for loan statuses, purchase dates, and loan transitions
Verifies interest calculations and transfer completeness
Verifies batch processing completeness and correctness
Listens to RabbitMQ event notifications for system events and provides verification utilities

findings.title: Complex interest calculation logic
findings.description: The system supports multiple interest calculation methods (Standard, SOFR-based, Combined) with configurable day counting conventions (360/365/366) that affect financial outcomes

findings.title: Servicing data ingestion from S3
findings.description: Tests verify proper ingestion of servicing data from S3 CSV files, including loan balance adjustments and file processing workflows

findings.title: Loan purchase correctness validation
findings.description: Tests verify that loan purchases create correct financial transfers between accounts including principal, interest, and volume fees
